trades.reasoning: Not in screener, pharma sector lagging in today's risk-on tech rally; freeing capital for higher-momentum opportunities
Top score 95 with RSI 65.3 in the ideal bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, and price well above SMA-20 — clean entry setup in a strong NASDAQ tape
Top score 95 with RSI 64 in bullish momentum zone and rising MACD histogram; crypto/AI infrastructure directly benefits from today's NASDAQ risk-on surge
Score 95 with RSI 65.7 in bullish zone and MACD bullish crossover; semiconductor display driver IC plays into the broader chip upcycle driving today's tech rally

decisions.briefing: NASDAQ surged 1.5% in a clear risk-on session, with tech and semis leading the market. I rotated out of NVO (Novo Nordisk) — absent from the screener and lacking momentum signals in a tech-dominated tape — to free up capital. Proceeds fund three new high-scoring (95) momentum positions: AAOI (optical networking), IREN (crypto/AI infrastructure), and HIMX (semiconductors), all with RSI in the ideal 55–70 bullish zone and MACD crossovers confirming entry.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a strong risk-on session on April 24, with the NASDAQ outperforming the broader S&P 500 by nearly 2x, suggesting institutional rotation back into growth and technology. Semiconductor and AI-infrastructure names led gains as investors grew more confident in the near-term earnings outlook heading into peak reporting season. The relative strength of NASDAQ versus S&P 500 signals that risk appetite is focused specifically on high-beta tech rather than a broad market move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市4月24日呈現明顯的風險偏好走勢，納斯達克指數漲幅幾乎是標普500的兩倍，反映機構資金重新流入成長型及科技股。半導體與AI基礎設施類股領漲，投資人對即將進入高峰期的財報季抱持樂觀態度。納斯達克相對強於大盤的格局，顯示此輪上漲屬於高貝他科技股的精準布局，而非全面性的市場反彈。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock is moving up or down on a scale of 0–100. An RSI between 55 and 70 is considered the 'bullish momentum zone' — strong enough to show real buying interest, but not yet overbought (above 70) where a pullback becomes more likely. Today's buys (AAOI, IREN, HIMX) all sit in this sweet spot, which is why they scored 95 while stocks with RSI above 70 scored lower despite also being technically bullish.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股票上漲或下跌的速度，數值介於0至100之間。RSI在55至70之間被視為「牛市動能區間」——強勁到足以顯示真實的買盤興趣，但尚未進入超買區（70以上），超買區往往預示回調風險增加。今日買入的AAOI、IREN、HIMX均落在這個「甜蜜點」，這也是為何它們能拿到95分高評分，而RSI超過70的股票即便技術面同樣偏多，評分卻相對較低。
